name: Gelar Rahadian Fajar
introduction: I build thoughtful, accessible web experiences with a focus on clean interfaces, reliable engineering, and the details that make products feel effortless.
bio: I’m a developer focused on creating polished web experiences where thoughtful design and dependable engineering work together. I enjoy turning complex requirements into interfaces that feel clear, intuitive, and easy to use.

My work spans frontend and full-stack development, with particular attention to maintainable architecture, accessibility, responsive behavior, and performance. I approach each project as a product problem—not only a coding task.
I care about the details that users notice and the foundations they do not: consistent systems, readable code, sensible tradeoffs, and software that remains reliable as it grows.
